case_title: TAKE LEGEND LLC VS. BRADFORD NICHOLSON ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE LEGEND LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICHOLSON, BRADFORD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1108 HOWARD STREET, 3RD FLOOR, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED***; ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAKE LEGEND LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NICHOLSON, BRADFORD DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
